description: Your goal is to automate a mortality review process using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Using the clinical dataset of Hepatitis patients (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Data\hepatitis.csv), create and run an Epi Info script named mortality_filter.pgm in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Scripts\. The script must recode the 'Class' variable (1='Deceased', 2='Alive') into a new 'Outcome' variable, filter the dataset to include only deceased patients, and export the filtered list to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Output\mortality_review_list.csv.
